objective: Restore the default Codex reviewer persona path so codex-review-template audit and critique modes reach codex-fire without requiring CODEX_REVIEW_PERSONA.
scope_boundary: Issue #337 planning, execution-scope, review, validation, closeout, and local mirrors
out_of_scope: Changing model selection or reasoning effort
Implementing the LAM governance tooling adoption epic
research_summary: Issue #337 reports that scripts/codex-review-template.sh defaults CODEX_REVIEW_PERSONA to docs/agents/codex-reviewer.md, but that file is absent. The template checks the persona before constructing audit/critique prompts and before calling codex-fire.sh, so the default invocation fails at setup. Existing tests cover override failure propagation; this slice adds a tracked default persona and a default-path fake-Codex regression.

sprints.name: Planning and scope
sprints.goal: Create issue-backed governance artifacts before changing the review template surface.
tasks: Record same-family exception for no-HITL execution
acceptance_criteria: Execution scope covers only issue #337 files
Same-family exception documents controls and expiry

sprints.name: Default persona repair
sprints.goal: Restore a tracked canonical persona file for the template default path.
acceptance_criteria: Default persona path exists as a tracked file
Audit/critique setup can read persona content before wrapper dispatch

sprints.name: E2E validation and closeout
sprints.goal: Prove the default audit path reaches codex-fire and complete Stage 6 evidence.
tasks: Run targeted shell and pytest validation
Record focused review, validation, closeout, and issue comment evidence
acceptance_criteria: Default audit path reaches codex-fire without CODEX_REVIEW_PERSONA
Local CI Gate and GitHub checks pass
Stage 6 closeout artifact is created and hook passes

specialist_reviews.focus: Default persona path, override preservation, fake-Codex e2e coverage, and scope control
specialist_reviews.summary: Claude focused review found the fake-Codex regression design sound and identified that the new persona needed model frontmatter. The frontmatter was added. Its untracked-file note is expected before commit and is resolved by normal commit/PR flow.

alternate_model_review.summary: Claude CLI review returned FAIL with two findings: add persona model frontmatter and ensure artifacts are committed. The model frontmatter follow-up was applied; the commit/PR path resolves the pre-commit untracked artifact note. Deterministic tests, local CI, and GitHub checks remain the merge controls.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Proceed with issue #337 default Codex reviewer persona repair, tests, validation, and closeout.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Add the persona file, regression test, focused review, validation, closeout, and PR.

material_deviation_rules: Do not edit downstream product repositories.
Do not change model selection or reasoning effort for codex-fire dispatch.
Do not remove CODEX_REVIEW_PERSONA override behavior.
If another missing default artifact blocks the same invocation path, document it and either fix it in scope only when required for #337 ACs or create a follow-up issue.
